perspectives.description: The woman who must decide whether to isolate her husband to protect their children from a contagious disease, weighing her husband's emotional needs against her children's safety.
The husband diagnosed with a contagious disease who is facing isolation from his family during a critical time, feeling the emotional impact of being separated from his children.
The children who are at risk of contracting the disease from their father, whose well-being and emotional connection to their father are at stake.
